flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Copiah-Lincoln Community College are 5% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($31.2k vs $33.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Copiah-Lincoln Community College rose 43% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.2k → $7.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Copiah-Lincoln Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.4k → $4.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Copiah-Lincoln Community College rose 160% between 2006 and 2009 (16.2% → 42.2%).
